name: Broiled Striped Bass
recipeInstructions:
1. Fillet and skin the bass.
2. Cook it in wine in a hot oven in the juice of a lemon and 1 tablespoon butter for 15 minutes.
3. Remove the fillets; reduce the cooking liquid by boiling.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes and cook until done.
5. Finally, add the cream sauce, chopped parsley, chopped chives, and yolks of two eggs.
6. Cook, stirring until thick and creamy.
7. Pour over the bass fillets and serve.
